details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The agent successfully created a complete Prisma generator package with proper structure, generator protocol integration, DMMF parsing, and comprehensive TypeScript code generation. All CRUD methods are properly typed, enums are handled, relation fields are correctly filtered, and auto-generated fields are appropriately managed. The implementation includes a fetch-based runtime client, robust scalar-to-TypeScript type mapping, and extensive test coverage validating core functionality. TypeScript conventions are followed throughout. The only minor deduction is for potential edge cases in error handling or production hardening that exceed the stated requirements, making this near-perfect but not quite absolute perfection.
